SEARCH
Package simpaths.model

Class Person

java.lang.Object
simpaths.model.Person
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<Person>, microsim.agent.Weight, microsim.event.EventListener, microsim.statistics.IDoubleSource, microsim.statistics.IIntSource
@Entity public class Person extends Object implements microsim.event.EventListener, microsim.statistics.IDoubleSource, microsim.statistics.IIntSource, microsim.agent.Weight, Comparable<Person>

    void
    setupNewBenefitUnit(boolean automaticUpdateOfBenefitUnits)
    CREATE NEW BENEFIT UNIT FOR PERSON A new benefit unit is created for someone when: they reach age of maturity - default to parental household (no change in household) they enter a new cohabiting relationship they leave a cohabiting relationship (in which case it is the woman that is allocated a new benefit unit)
    void

    • setupNewHousehold

    • setupNewBenefitUnit

      public void setupNewBenefitUnit(boolean automaticUpdateOfBenefitUnits)
      CREATE NEW BENEFIT UNIT FOR PERSON A new benefit unit is created for someone when: they reach age of maturity - default to parental household (no change in household) they enter a new cohabiting relationship they leave a cohabiting relationship (in which case it is the woman that is allocated a new benefit unit)
      Parameters:
      automaticUpdateOfBenefitUnits - - This is a toggle to control the automatic update of the model's set of benefitUnits, which would cause concurrent modification exception to be thrown if called within an iteration through benefitUnits. There are two possible causes of concurrent modification issues: 1) adding of the new benefitUnit to the model's benefitUnits set and 2) removal of the last person from the benefitUnit when updateHousehold() method is called would lead to the automatic removal of the old house from the model's benefitUnits set. To prevent concurrent modification exception being thrown, set this parameter to false and use the iterator on the benefitUnits to add the new benefitUnit manually e.g. (houseIterator.add(newHouse)). Also the updateHousehold() method will need to be called and the person removed from the old house manually outside the iteration through benefitUnits.

    • setupNewBenefitUnit

      public void setupNewBenefitUnit(Person partner, boolean automaticUpdateOfBenefitUnits)

    • compareTo

      public int compareTo(Person person)
      Specified by:
      compareTo in interface Comparable<Person>

      public void initialise_les_c6_from_c4()

    • getKey

      public microsim.data.db.PanelEntityKey getKey()
      Returns a defensive copy of the field. The caller of this method can do anything they want with the returned Key object, without affecting the internals of this class in any way.
